title: Million Mile
description: Massive kitchen sink pack with something for everyone.
body:
Automate and innovate with tech mods to mass produce every resource you could need and store them in a quick and easy to access way. Delve into spellcasting and rituals to produce reality defying effects like throwing fireballs, summoning demonic familiars, or flying around on a broomstick. Change your own body with transformations into a vampire or werewolf, experiencing the ups and downs of these magical creatures (you can always turn back though!). 

Explore through a host of new dimensions like the classic Aether or the dank depths of the Undergargen and the Deeper Dark. All through this you'll be rewarded for keeping a varied diet with the help of many food mods that let you make many tantalizing and rewarding dishes. 

For players looking for multiplayer, the pack contains a number of things to make it easier for you like Lightman's Currency powering the economy and Simple Voice Chat to easily chat on your adventures. When tired of the usual building and resource gathering you can unwind with minigames like board games (Table Top Craft), go kart racing (Automobility), or skateboarding (I Wanna Skate).

 

### HIGHLIGHTS

#### Tech
- Create and many addons
- Immersive Engineering
- Pneumaticraft
- Thermal Series
- Industrial Foregoing
- Powah!
- Refined Storage
- Simple Storage

#### Magic
- Ars Noveau
- Hex Casting
- Occultism
- Iron's Spells and Spellbooks
- Botania
- Mahou Tsukai
- Nature's Aura

#### Transformations
- Vampirism
- Werewolves

#### Dimensions
- The Undergarden
- The Bumblezone
- The Aether
- Deeper and Darker

#### Food
- Farmer's Delight and many addons
- Neapolitan
- Caupona
- Cooking for Blockheads
- Productive Bees
- Sushi Go Crafting

### SEPARATE MODS
As per these mods' licenses, they can't be redistributed in the modpack download itself and must be added manually after the modpack is installed for everything to work as expected. It is possible to play without these mods but some features will be missing.
